title: Calibrated PTA Evidence Identifies Low-Frequency Curvature but Not a Unique Nanohertz Source: Code and Compact Data Release
description: Code, compact data products, derived evidence tables, cross-PTA bridge outputs, figures, manuscript sources, and non-evidence production-gate diagnostics for the PRL submission Calibrated PTA Evidence Identifies Low-Frequency Curvature but Not a Unique Nanohertz Source. The release includes official public NANOGrav/PTArcade inputs needed by the analysis, compact derived outputs used by the paper, P0--P6 posterior-summary bridge outputs, final PRL stability diagnostics, timing/LSS gate reports, and reproduction commands. Large local MCMC chain dumps are excluded; summary diagnostics are included.

creators.name: DUAN, Ran
creators.affiliation: National Astronomical Observatories, Chinese Academy of Sciences

references: G. Agazie et al. (NANOGrav Collaboration), The NANOGrav 15 yr Data Set: Evidence for a Gravitational-wave Background, arXiv:2306.16213.
G. Agazie et al. (NANOGrav Collaboration), The NANOGrav 15 yr Data Set: Observations and Timing of 68 Millisecond Pulsars, arXiv:2306.16214.
A. Afzal et al. (NANOGrav Collaboration), The NANOGrav 15 yr Data Set: Search for Signals from New Physics, arXiv:2306.16219.
A. Mitridate et al., PTArcade, arXiv:2306.16377.
